scripts.secrets:check: echo '=====[ Running the `SECRETS:CHECK` script... ]====='; ggshield secret scan path . --recursive --yes

scripts-info.build:
Build the project for production.

  - SCRIPT: nuxt build
scripts-info.dev:
Start the local development server.

  - SCRIPT: nuxt dev
scripts-info.dev:host:
Start the local development server exposed to the network.

  - SCRIPT: nuxt dev --host
scripts-info.generate:
Generate a static version of the project.

  - SCRIPT: nuxt generate
scripts-info.preview:
Preview the production build locally.

  - SCRIPT: nuxt preview
scripts-info.info:
Display all available scripts with their descriptions.

  - SCRIPT: npm-scripts-info
scripts-info.lint:
Run all linters (ESLint, Prettier, Stylelint) in check mode.

  - SCRIPT: eslint . && prettier --check . && stylelint '**/*.{css,vue}'
scripts-info.lint:fix:
Run all linters and auto-fix all violations.

  - SCRIPT: eslint . --fix && prettier --write . && stylelint '**/*.{css,vue}' --fix
scripts-info.lint:es:
Run ESLint on the entire project.

  - SCRIPT: eslint .
scripts-info.lint:es:fix:
Run ESLint and auto-fix violations.

  - SCRIPT: eslint . --fix
scripts-info.lint:prettier:
Check code formatting with Prettier.

  - SCRIPT: prettier --check .
scripts-info.lint:prettier:fix:
Auto-format all files with Prettier.

  - SCRIPT: prettier --write .
scripts-info.lint:style:
Run Stylelint on CSS and Vue files.

  - SCRIPT: stylelint '**/*.{css,vue}'
scripts-info.lint:style:fix:
Run Stylelint and auto-fix violations in CSS and Vue files.

  - SCRIPT: stylelint '**/*.{css,vue}' --fix
scripts-info.type:check:
Run TypeScript type checking without emitting files.

  - SCRIPT: vue-tsc --noEmit
scripts-info.circ:check:
Check for circular dependencies in the project.

  - SCRIPT: madge --circular .
scripts-info.secrets:check:
Scan the project recursively for exposed secrets.

  - SCRIPT: ggshield secret scan path . --recursive --yes
scripts-info.clean:
Remove Nuxt build and output directories.

  - SCRIPT: rimraf .nuxt .output
scripts-info.clean:full:
Remove Nuxt build, output, and node_modules directories.

  - SCRIPT: rimraf .nuxt .output node_modules
scripts-info.prepare:
Set up Husky git hooks.

  - SCRIPT: husky
